title: IC3 Regional Forum Pune for Student Counseling
text: Regional forum in Pune Event Status: Completed Date: June 11, 2025 Location: The Kalyani School, AZ1/010, Manjari Budruk, Pune, Maharashtra 412307, India Recommended for: Potential applicants Book now The IC3 Regional Forums are a mission-driven effort to bring counseling to every school. At the heart of the forums lies the belief that every student deserves access to guidance and clarity to build a fulfilling future. The Kalyani School, AZ1/010, Manjari Budruk, Pune, Maharashtra 412307, India
summary: The IC3 Regional Forum in Pune, held at The Kalyani School on June 11, 2025, aimed to provide educational counseling to prospective students.
